name: TridentSynth Live Runner
description: Submit a live TridentSynth job through the public TridentSynth web form and optionally poll the results page until completion.

inputs.name: target_smiles
inputs.description: Single target-molecule SMILES string for TridentSynth.

inputs.name: use_pks
inputs.description: Whether to include the PKS synthesis strategy. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: use_bio
inputs.description: Whether to include the Bio synthesis strategy. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: use_chem
inputs.description: Whether to include the Chem synthesis strategy. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: max_bio_steps
inputs.description: Maximum biological synthesis steps. Allowed values: 1, 2, or 3.

inputs.name: max_chem_steps
inputs.description: Maximum chemical synthesis steps. Allowed values: 1, 2, or 3.

inputs.name: pks_release_mechanism
inputs.description: PKS release mechanism. Allowed values: thiolysis or cyclization.

inputs.name: max_carbon
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet maximum carbon atom filter.

inputs.name: max_nitrogen
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet maximum nitrogen atom filter.

inputs.name: max_oxygen
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet maximum oxygen atom filter.

inputs.name: auto_optimize_unspecified
inputs.description: If true, auto-fill omitted optional settings with a compact exploratory configuration. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: wait_for_completion
inputs.description: If true, poll the results page until the job completes. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: poll_seconds
inputs.description: Seconds between results-page polling attempts. Defaults to 10.

inputs.name: timeout_seconds
inputs.description: Maximum total polling time in seconds. Defaults to 300.

inputs.name: acknowledge_controlled_substance_warning
inputs.description: If the site shows its controlled-substance acknowledgement screen, continue only when this is true.

outputs.description: JSON-serializable summary containing the submitted query, parsed job info, results URL, and parsed results if available.
